title: The Story of You
text:
## The Story of You

Everyone has a unique {noun} inside of them that's just {verb ending in -ing} to come out! So, what are you standing on the {plural noun} for? It's time to step into that {place} and share your experiences with (the) {plural noun}! Once you do, you'll be surprised at how many {job} can't wait to hear more. Readers love {adjective} stories that are told from the PO-{noun} of the person who lived through them. You know what they say, {plural noun} are stranger than fiction. Of course, you'll have to be as brave as a/an {adjective} in shining armor to share your innermost {body part} and feelings. But there are great rewards for writers who are truly {adjective}. After all, it takes a lot of {body part} to air out your {plural noun} laundry in hopes of inspiring others to overcome their own {plural noun}. But in the {noun}, it's {adverb} worth it!
